content: nginx production configuration for Laravel: Current TenantSmith has minimal nginx configs (dev and prod) with no security headers, no gzip, no static asset caching. (1) Security headers needed: X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Content-Security-Policy, HSTS (for HTTPS). (2) Gzip: gzip on, gzip_vary on, gzip_comp_level 6, gzip_types for text/css, text/javascript, application/json, application/javascript, image/svg+xml, font/woff2. (3) Static asset caching: Vite generates content-hashed filenames, perfect for expires 1y with Cache-Control public immutable. (4) Fastcgi tuning: buffer sizes and timeouts. (5) server_tokens off to hide nginx version. (6) Hide sensitive files: deny access to .env, composer.json, etc. Prod nginx already handles Cloudflare challenge well-known path.
